case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS WILLIAMS, MARK A.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARK A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARK A. $2,696.96 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,716.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
